content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09A","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table into table `J09A_temp` for all records where the tour starts with `J09A`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to table `J09A_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has less than 3 `EQUNR`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses in address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09A_temp` with the `EABLG` table using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   - Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   - Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09A` using exactly these column names:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
   - `HAUS`
   - `ANLAGE`
   - `ME_MA_ID`
   - `EQUNR`
   - `HOUSE_NUM1`
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
   - `TITLE`
   - `FORENAME`
   - `SURNAME`
   - `STREET`
   - `STREETNO`
   - `POST_CODE1`
   - `CITY1`
   - `CITY2`
   - `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached.
   - file_path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`

10. Delete the temporary table.

"}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table into table `J09A_temp` for all records where the tour starts with `J09A`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to table `J09A_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has less than 3 `EQUNR`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses in address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09A_temp` with the `EABLG` table using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   - Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   - Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09A` using exactly these column names:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
   - `HAUS`
   - `ANLAGE`
   - `ME_MA_ID`
   - `EQUNR`
   - `HOUSE_NUM1`
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
   - `TITLE`
   - `FORENAME`
   - `SURNAME`
   - `STREET`
   - `STREETNO`
   - `POST_CODE1`
   - `CITY1`
   - `CITY2`
   - `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached.
   - file_path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`

10. Delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp; CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'; UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA' WHERE HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09A_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3); UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld'); SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM J09A_temp;

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'
CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA' WHERE HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09A_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3)
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')

args.sql_query: SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS AS "HAUS", t.ANLAGE AS "ANLAGE", t.ME_MA_ID AS "ME_MA_ID", t.EQUNR AS "EQUNR", t.HOUSE_NUM1 AS "HOUSE_NUM1", t.ENTSCHEIDUNG AS "ENTSCHEIDUNG", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS "TITLE", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS "FORENAME", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS "SURNAME", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS "STREET", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS "STREETNO", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS "POST_CODE1", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS "CITY1", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS "CITY2", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND (COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '') THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS "EMAIL" FROM J09A_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR
